about.title: About Us
about.heading: About
about.subtitle: Experts in
about.description1: We are a versatile and innovative company in the construction sector, managing projects and strategic solutions for private institutions. We have a team of highly qualified professionals and experts at the service of our projects.
about.description2: Our work translates into suitability, efficacy and quality for our clients, guaranteeing high standards in every project we develop.
about.missionText: At CONSTRUESCALA we specialize in offering comprehensive solutions in finishes for construction projects, guaranteeing high standards of quality, compliance and efficiency. We are committed to providing adequate infrastructure for the work environment, as well as the technological, logistical and human resources necessary to ensure an agile, safe service aligned with each client's needs.
about.visionText: To be a reliable and recognized company for quality in finishes, building a solid reputation through strategic alliances and professional services, with the goal of developing our own projects with excellent market projection in the medium term.

ctaSection.heading: Do you have a project in mind?
ctaSection.description: Contact us to discuss your ideas and receive a personalized quote

items.title: Architectural Design
items.subtitle: We create spaces that inspire
items.description: Architectural design, a discipline whose purpose is to generate proposals and ideas for the creation and realization of physical spaces framed within architecture. At this scale of design, geometric-spatial, hygienic-construction and formal aesthetic factors intervene.

items.title: Wood & Ambience
items.subtitle: Comprehensive wood solutions
items.description: We develop and implement wood projects with a functional and aesthetic approach, adapted to each space. We execute from structures to custom finishes, integrating specialized carpentry techniques and interior design criteria.

items.title: Residential & Commercial Interior Design
items.subtitle: Interior design with technical approach
items.description: We offer interior design services with a technical approach, accompanied by the comprehensive execution of the project. We specialize in solutions adapted to space needs, meeting quality, functionality and visual coherence standards.

portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.heading: Our
portfolioPage.cta: Want to be our next project?
portfolioPage.ctaDescription: Tell us your idea and let's make a space that exceeds your expectations a reality

items.title: Monte Verde Farm House Renovation
items.description: Partial renovation focused on renewing floors and wall finishes, with the objective of integrating natural materials and adding warmth to the space.
details: Installation of ceramic simulating natural stone as new floor covering
Application of textured finish on interior walls
Rustic and harmonious aesthetic with the natural environment
items.result: Interior spaces with greater character, warmth and connection with the environment, through the use of noble materials and artisanal finishes.

items.title: Mosaic Floor Installation
items.description: Replacement of the existing floor in the restaurant through controlled demolition and subsequent installation of checkerboard mosaic floor.
details: Preparation and leveling of the base surface
Supply and installation of checkerboard model mosaic
items.result: Renovated floor with distinctive aesthetic finish, resistant to commercial traffic and in line with the restaurant's visual identity.

items.title: Remodeling and Furniture Reform
items.description: Integral apartment remodeling aimed at modernizing spaces, renewing finishes and incorporating fixed and mobile furniture.
details: Renovation of electrical and hydraulic installations
Design and installation of fixed furniture (kitchen, closets, bathrooms)
Optimization of artificial lighting with LED system
items.result: Renovated, functional and updated space, with improvements in comfort, aesthetics and real estate value.

footer.description: Comprehensive solutions in finishes for construction projects. Guaranteeing high standards of quality, compliance and efficiency.
